steps.title: Understand vertical translation
steps.content: Translating down by 6 units means every y-coordinate decreases by 6. We apply this by subtracting 6 from the right side of the equation.

steps.title: Write the translated equation
steps.content:
Original equation: $y = 7x$

After translating down 6 units:
$$y = 7x - 6$$
This confirms B is correct.
